_meta.note: This is the green-ai build phase plan derived from the product capability map. It replaces the machine-generated domain_priority.json ranking for BUILD ORDER decisions. The engine should read this to understand sequence before any phase 2+ planning.

phase_1_foundation.description: Must exist before any user-facing feature can start. SLICE-001 through SLICE-006.
phase_1_foundation.gate: All phase 1 domains must be stable and SLICE-006 integration tests must pass before phase 2 begins.

phase_2_core_product_loop.description: Core notification functionality: create, send, route, track. Blocked until SLICE-006 passes.

domains.name: customer_administration
domains.note: Circular dependency on identity_access write path — must come after SLICE-006

phase_3_lookup_and_address.description: Address import pipeline and owner resolution. Most country-specific complexity.
phase_3_lookup_and_address.country_note: Design one discovery pass per country before combining into a single implementation plan.

domains.name: address_management
domains.note: NEEDS DISCOVERY PASS — import pipeline affects DB schema fundamentally

domains.name: lookup
domains.note: NEEDS DISCOVERY PASS PER COUNTRY — legally sensitive

domains.name: subscription
domains.note: NEEDS DISCOVERY PASS — anonymous token auth has security implications

phase_4_extensions.description: Channel extensions and citizen-facing features. Plan individually.

domains.name: conversation
domains.note: Two-way SMS — requires dedicated inbound numbers (carrier cost)

domains.name: phone_numbers
domains.note: Required only when Conversation domain is built

phase_5_analytics.description: Reporting and statistics. All need discovery passes — current scores too low.

domains.name: statistics
domains.note: NEEDS DISCOVERY PASS — do not plan until > 0.80

domains.name: monitoring
domains.note: NEEDS DISCOVERY PASS — likely Azure Monitor + AppInsights

domains.name: benchmark
domains.note: Internal tool — plan as analytics extension if needed

not_porting.description: These sms-service domains have no analog in green-ai. Do not plan.

domains.name: finance
domains.reason: e-conomic invoicing — sms-service billing, not a green-ai product

domains_needing_discovery_before_phase_2.why: Template engine design is a major architectural decision
Legal complexity (GDPR, opt-in laws) varies by country

domains_needing_discovery_before_phase_3.why: Country-specific external APIs — one pass per country
Anonymous token auth model has security implications

domains_needing_discovery_before_phase_5.why: Likely Azure Monitor + AppInsights but unconfirmed
